Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Gilbert Jay, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Neveo Mosser is present.
Michael Sherwood Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant John Getzow aka John Getzaw is present.
Rita Gilmore representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 17, 2007 is vacated.

Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mike Rossoff, 863-7100, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN GETZOW'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED, FIVE DAYS TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
